use_cases: Contact or About page call-to-action buttons with engaging hover animations
Navigation elements requiring visual feedback on interaction
Interactive CTA buttons in landing pages where user engagement matters
Modern web application buttons with branded hover color transitions
ai_summary: A pill-shaped contact button featuring a hover-triggered morph animation where a colored circle expands from the center while text slides out and an arrow icon slides in. The button uses smooth 300ms transitions with a dark background that can be customized via CSS variables for brand alignment. Ideal for modern SaaS and landing pages requiring engaging micro-interactions.
